title: Copy labels from one board to another board
excerpt:
It will be great if you can copy your labels from one board to another board. So not “Default Board Labels” as you can under admin. 
We have boards that are used in different contexts and therefore they also have differe…

posts.author: Sbi (Søren Bilde)
posts.cookedHtml:
It will be great if you can copy your labels from one board to another board. So not “Default Board Labels” as you can under admin.

We have boards that are used in different contexts and therefore they also have different labels. Some boards have many labels and others have few so as not to have unnecessary labels and we can therefore not always use Default Board Labels.

Sometimes we need to copy all labels from one board to another board and we now have to do it manually which is time consuming

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Sbi,

The Duplicates and Uniques can help you out here. Here is a video of how. If you have any questions, you can reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: cbrunskill (Catherine Brunskill)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. It would be great if this functionality was built-in to Monday.com and didn’t require a third-party app.

posts.author: inspiredearth (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Totally bizzare to me that such a rudimentary feature requires a paid third-party app.

Come on Monday, why is it hard to simply copy a column (and it’s status label configuration in my situation) to another board? Such an important and hugely time-saving feature.
